sources.notes: Official-looking Instagram identity was unavailable. Aggregator menus, ratings and user photos were rejected.

sources.label: Four Seasons Sundara page
sources.notes: Live venue-controlled all-day menu. Dollar-like glyph is the site display convention; footer explicitly defines values as 000s of IDR plus 10% service and 11% tax.
